zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Tregoz I於1168年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire68歲，母親Agnes de Lucy44歲。他於大約1190年與Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1191年被列為sheriff of wiltshire。他去世於1215年4月29日在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Tregoz I于1168年出生在英国英格兰維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire68岁，母亲Agnes de Lucy44岁。他于大约1190年与Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1191年被列为sheriff of wiltshire。他去世于1215年4月29日在英国賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾艾比 多雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tregoz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from Treago in Crantock (Cornwall). The placename derives from Middle Cornish tre ‘estate, farmstead’ + uncertain final element.
Altered form of French   Tricot   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. It was reportedly brought to North America from England. Today it is found mainly in PA and OH. Compare   Trago  .
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Trago
meanings: Variant of   Trego  , a surname of Cornish and French origin. In the US, it is found mainly in PA and OH.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Tregoz I was born in 1168, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire, was 68 and his mother, Agnes de Lucy, was 44. He married Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham about 1190, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. In 1191, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as sheriff of wiltshire. He died on 29 April 1215, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Tregoz I est né en 1168, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire, avait 68 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Lucy, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Sibyl d’Ewyas Lady of Burneham environ 1190, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. En 1191, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of wiltshire. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1215, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Tregoz I 1168 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire 68 und seine Mutter Agnes de Lucy 44. Er hat um 1190 in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1191, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of wiltshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. April 1215 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham circa 1190, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1191, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of wiltshire. Morì il 29 aprile 1215, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Tregoz Iが1168年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshireは68歳，母Agnes de Lucyは44歳であった。約1190年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドでSibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burnehamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1191年，23歳の時，職業はsheriff of wiltshireと記録されている。彼は1215年4月29日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Tregoz I(이)가 1168년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire(은)는 68세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Lucy(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1190년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1191년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of wiltshire이었다. 그는 1215년 4월 29일 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Tregoz I nasceu em 1168, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire, tinha 68 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Lucy, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham aproximadamente 1190, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1191, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of wiltshire. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1215, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Tregoz I родился в 1168 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire было 68 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Lucy, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham около 1190 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1191 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of wiltshire. Он умер 29 апреля 1215 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Tregoz I nació en 1168, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William de Tregoz Sheriff of Wiltshire, tenía 68 años y su mamá, Agnes de Lucy, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Sibyl de Ewyas Lady of Burneham aproximadamente 1190, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1191, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of wiltshire. Murió el 29 de abril de 1215, en Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
